requirement_topic.en: SEEG Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116 Anti-Islanding, IEC 61727 Utility Interface, and 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: SEEG并网审查——IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: SEEG併網審查——IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V參數

summary.en: Gabon does not publish a Qatar-style national public PV inverter connection specification in the sources reviewed. In practice, utility-interconnected PV projects should expect SEEG technical connection review and project-specific requirements, with IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence commonly requested by developers, lenders, and utility engineers. Gabon's low-voltage supply is commonly documented as 220/380 V at 50 Hz. Inverter firmware, protection thresholds, reconnection delays, voltage and frequency trip points, and reactive-power or power-factor behaviour should be validated for SEEG's local connection point rather than assumed from China factory defaults.
summary.zh: 在已审阅来源中，未发现加蓬发布类似卡塔尔的全国公开光伏逆变器并网技术规格。实际操作中，公用电网并网光伏项目通常应预期接受SEEG技术接入审查及项目特定要求，开发商、融资方和电网工程师通常会要求IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据。加蓬低压供电通常记录为50 Hz、220/380 V。逆变器固件、保护阈值、重连延迟、电压和频率跳闸点以及无功或功率因数行为，应针对SEEG当地接入点验证，而不能沿用中国出厂默认假设。
summary.zht: 在已審閱來源中，未發現加彭發布類似卡達的全國公開光伏逆變器併網技術規格。實際操作中，公用電網併網光伏項目通常應預期接受SEEG技術接入審查及項目特定要求，開發商、融資方和電網工程師通常會要求IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據。加彭低壓供電通常記錄為50 Hz、220/380 V。逆變器韌體、保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓和頻率跳脫點以及無功或功率因數行為，應針對SEEG當地接入點驗證，而不能沿用中國出廠預設假設。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 60038 context — nominal low-voltage systems, with Gabon commonly listed at 220/380 V, 50 Hz
SEEG project-specific technical connection conditions for grid-tied systems

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test reports. These documents are based on China grid practices and do not by themselves establish SEEG acceptance, ARSEE authorisation, or compliance with project-lender IEC requirements in Gabon.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试报告。上述文件基于中国电网实践，本身不能证明SEEG接受、ARSEE授权或符合加蓬项目融资方的IEC要求。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試報告。上述文件基於中國電網實務，本身不能證明SEEG接受、ARSEE授權或符合加彭項目融資方的IEC要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid documents should be treated as supporting background only. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 test evidence for the exact inverter model or family, a SEEG-specific settings file, documentation of voltage/frequency protection thresholds, reconnection timing, anti-islanding mode, and commissioning test procedures. Any firmware profile designed for China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz network should still be checked against the actual Gabon connection point, local voltage variation, and SEEG project conditions.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件只能作为支持性背景材料。出口商应准备涵盖特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62116和IEC 61727测试证据、SEEG专用设置文件、电压/频率保护阈值、重连时间、防孤岛模式及调试测试程序文件。即使固件配置同样面向中国220/380 V、50 Hz网络，也仍须针对加蓬实际接入点、当地电压波动及SEEG项目条件进行核验。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件只能作為支持性背景材料。出口商應準備涵蓋特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62116和IEC 61727測試證據、SEEG專用設定檔、電壓/頻率保護閾值、重連時間、防孤島模式及調試測試程序文件。即使韌體配置同樣面向中國220/380 V、50 Hz網路，也仍須針對加彭實際接入點、當地電壓波動及SEEG項目條件進行核驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied PV projects because SEEG connection approval and project-specific commissioning conditions govern interconnection; exact evidence depends on project size, connection point, and contract
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's domestic grid review only and is not transferable to SEEG Gabon grid-connection acceptance

source.publisher: SEEG (Societe d'Energie et d'Eau du Gabon)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat SEEG connection approval as a project gate, not a paperwork formality. Chinese GB/T or NB/T grid certificates should be supplemented with IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, SEEG-specific firmware settings, and commissioning records for the actual Gabon connection point. Confirm the current SEEG connection procedure and technical settings before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将SEEG接入批准视为项目门槛，而非单纯文件手续。中国GB/T或NB/T并网证书应补充IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据、SEEG专用固件设置及加蓬实际接入点的调试记录。出货前请核实现行SEEG接入程序和技术参数。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將SEEG接入批准視為項目門檻，而非單純文件手續。中國GB/T或NB/T併網證書應補充IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據、SEEG專用韌體設定及加彭實際接入點的調試記錄。出貨前請核實現行SEEG接入程序和技術參數。

requirement_topic.en: ARSEE Electricity-Sector Authorisation and Project Approval — Grid-Tied Solar PV
requirement_topic.zh: ARSEE电力行业授权及项目审批——并网太阳能光伏
requirement_topic.zht: ARSEE電力行業授權及項目審批——併網太陽能光伏

summary.en: ARSEE is Gabon's regulator for the drinking-water and electric-energy sectors. Commercial, utility-scale, or third-party grid-tied PV projects should expect regulatory authorisation, concession, licence, tariff, or contract review outside the inverter type-test package. The inverter evidence package therefore must support the project developer's ARSEE and SEEG submissions: model identification, IEC safety and grid-interface reports, country settings, installation manual in French where required, and environmental suitability for Gabon's humid equatorial operating conditions.
summary.zh: ARSEE是加蓬饮用水和电能行业监管机构。商业、公用事业规模或第三方并网光伏项目通常应预期在逆变器型式试验包之外，还涉及监管授权、特许、许可、电价或合同审查。因此，逆变器证据包必须支持项目开发商向ARSEE和SEEG提交材料：型号识别、IEC安全和电网接口报告、国家参数设置、必要时的法语安装手册，以及对加蓬潮湿赤道运行条件的环境适用性。
summary.zht: ARSEE是加彭飲用水和電能行業監管機構。商業、公用事業規模或第三方併網光伏項目通常應預期在逆變器型式試驗包之外，還涉及監管授權、特許、許可、電價或合約審查。因此，逆變器證據包必須支持項目開發商向ARSEE和SEEG提交材料：型號識別、IEC安全和電網介面報告、國家參數設定、必要時的法語安裝手冊，以及對加彭潮濕赤道運行條件的環境適用性。

standards_or_laws: ARSEE electricity-sector regulatory authorisation, licence, concession, tariff, or contract review as applicable to the project
SEEG technical connection conditions for utility-interconnected PV systems
IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence used as project technical support

summary.en: China's project approvals and grid-connection processes are administered under Chinese energy policy and Chinese grid operator rules. An inverter already used in a Chinese distributed or utility-scale PV project may have domestic connection records, but those records do not replace Gabon regulatory authorisation, SEEG connection review, or project-owner technical acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国项目审批和并网流程依据中国能源政策及中国电网运营商规则执行。已用于中国分布式或公用事业规模光伏项目的逆变器可能具备国内接入记录，但这些记录不能替代加蓬监管授权、SEEG接入审查或项目业主技术验收。
summary.zht: 中國項目審批和併網流程依據中國能源政策及中國電網運營商規則執行。已用於中國分散式或公用事業規模光伏項目的逆變器可能具備國內接入記錄，但這些記錄不能替代加彭監管授權、SEEG接入審查或項目業主技術驗收。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A Chinese domestic project approval history does not answer Gabon project-authorisation questions. Exporters should coordinate with the Gabon project developer to confirm whether the project needs ARSEE licensing or contract review, whether SEEG is the off-taker or distribution connection reviewer, and whether donor or lender specifications require IEC reports, French documentation, spare-parts commitments, remote monitoring, or local service arrangements.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内项目审批历史不能回答加蓬项目授权问题。出口商应与加蓬项目开发商确认项目是否需要ARSEE许可或合同审查、SEEG是否为购电方或配电接入审查方，以及捐助方或融资方规格是否要求IEC报告、法语文件、备件承诺、远程监控或本地服务安排。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內項目審批歷史不能回答加彭項目授權問題。出口商應與加彭項目開發商確認項目是否需要ARSEE許可或合約審查、SEEG是否為購電方或配電接入審查方，以及捐助方或融資方規格是否要求IEC報告、法語文件、備件承諾、遠端監控或本地服務安排。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Gabon electricity-sector law, ARSEE authorisation, SEEG connection, PPA, concession, procurement, donor, or lender documents apply to the project
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese project approvals and domestic grid records do not transfer to Gabon regulatory or utility approval

source.publisher: ARSEE (Autorite de Regulation du secteur de l'Eau potable et de l'Energie Electrique)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Gabon, inverter compliance is only one part of a project approval chain. Confirm ARSEE authorisation, SEEG connection conditions, PPA or concession requirements, and lender technical specifications before relying on Chinese domestic project records. Package IEC reports, French-language documentation, country settings, and service commitments for the developer's submission file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对加蓬而言，逆变器合规只是项目审批链的一部分。依赖中国国内项目记录前，请确认ARSEE授权、SEEG接入条件、购电协议或特许要求及融资方技术规格。应为开发商提交文件包准备IEC报告、法语文件、国家参数设置及服务承诺。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對加彭而言，逆變器合規只是項目審批鏈的一部分。依賴中國國內項目記錄前，請確認ARSEE授權、SEEG接入條件、購電協議或特許要求及融資方技術規格。應為開發商提交文件包準備IEC報告、法語文件、國家參數設定及服務承諾。
